edit: Added a `_comment` field to package.json describing TRACE as a Claude Code plugin that turns a PRD into a living decision log.

Confirmed src/ now contains four TypeScript modules totaling 524 lines, with session-proposer.ts (156) and review.ts (145) as the largest, indicating a session-scoped proposer has been added alongside the base proposer.
Whether Stop hook latency is acceptable on long-running turns.

Switched session-proposer from SessionEnd to Stop hook with a watermark-based incremental slice so each turn proposes only on new events containing meaningful tool calls (Edit/Write/Bash/MultiEdit/NotebookEdit).
